_instructions.services: Each service should match a slug declared in business.json.services_offered when generating landing pages.
_instructions.id: Unique identifier. Usually matches the slug used for routing.
_instructions.slug: URL path segment: /services/{slug}. Must be unique.
_instructions.highlights: Bullet points shown on the service card and landing page.
_instructions.faq: Optional service-specific FAQ shown on the landing page.
_instructions.variant: Services visual variant key. Default: grid. Options include grid, list, cards, tabs, featured.

section_subtitle: From design to build, we handle every step of your outdoor project.

services.name: Masonry
services.short_description: Brick, stone and block work built to last.
services.full_description: Our masonry team builds retaining walls, fireplaces, outdoor kitchens and custom stone features using durable materials and proven techniques for Virginia Beach homes and businesses.

services.name: Hardscape
services.short_description: Complete outdoor living spaces with durable hardscaping.
services.full_description: We design and install hardscape projects that combine function and curb appeal — walkways, seating walls, fire pits and full outdoor rooms tailored to your property.

services.name: Patios
services.short_description: Custom paver and stone patios for entertaining outdoors.
services.full_description: From classic brick patterns to modern large-format pavers, we build patios that handle coastal weather and create comfortable outdoor living space year-round.

services.name: Retaining Walls
services.short_description: Structural and decorative walls that manage grade and erosion.
services.full_description: We install engineered retaining walls that stabilize slopes, create usable yard space and add lasting visual structure to your landscape.
